title.title: Test framework trends: insights from ReportPortal reporting volume

contentfulBlogPost.seoDescription: Which testing frameworks dominate ReportPortal launches? Explore real automation usage trends.
contentfulBlogPost.author: ReportPortal Team

position in 2023 (16.2%) to the clear #1 framework in 2024–2025, reaching 29% of all launches in 2025.","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Cypress, despite periodic "end-of-life" discussions in the community, continues to show stable usage across many existing automation suites.","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"At the same time, former leaders like TestNG and Cucumber steadily declined.","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"heading-2","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"How testing ecosystems differ in ","marks":[],"data":{}}]}]},{"nodeType":"table-cell","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Remains common for large regression suites and enterprise systems with long-lived test infrastructure. ","marks":[],"data":{}}]}]}]},{"nodeType":"table-row","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"table-cell","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":".NET","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"data":{}},{"nodeType":"text","value":" ","marks":[],"data":{}}]}]},{"nodeType":"table-cell","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Small but steady presence (NUnit, xUnit, related frameworks). ","marks":[],"data":{}}]}]},{"nodeType":"table-cell","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"If results stay in CI logs or local reports, you miss centralized insights into failures and trends. ","marks":[],"data":{}}]}]}]}]},{"nodeType":"heading-2","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"From insight to action","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Framework distribution by reporting volume is not only a popularity ranking.
It reflects real usage and real strategic direction.","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Here is how teams use this data in practice.","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"1. Plan framework migrations before they become urgent","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"When a framework steadily loses reporting volume year over year, it rarely happens by accident.","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Teams use this signal to: ","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"unordered-list","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"list-item","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Identify frameworks that are quietly becoming legacy ","marks":[],"data":{}}]}]},{"nodeType":"list-item","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Audit critical test suites still running on them ","marks":[],"data":{}}]}]},{"nodeType":"list-item","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Plan migrations while expertise and community support still exist ","marks":[],"data":{}}]}]}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"This turns migration discussions into concrete, evidence-based decisions:
"This framework is down to 5% of our volume and has been shrinking for three years – let’s plan to move off it next year".","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"2. Align skills, hiring, and training with real usage","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Year-by-year framework distribution also acts as a skills map for the organization.","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Teams use it to:","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"unordered-list","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"list-item","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Focus internal training on frameworks that are clearly gaining share ","marks":[],"data":{}}]}]},{"nodeType":"list-item","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Prioritize hiring profiles aligned with dominant CI tooling ","marks":[],"data":{}}]}]},{"nodeType":"list-item","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Invest in shared libraries, templates, and best practices where adoption is growing","marks":[],"data":{}}]}]}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Instead of relying on external trend reports, teams rely on their own data:
"Our ReportPortal data shows this framework doubled its volume in two years – it should be a first-class skill in our team".","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"3. Justify investments and evaluate experiments","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Multi-year reporting data connects tooling decisions with outcomes.","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Teams use it to: ","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"unordered-list","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"list-item","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Evaluate whether framework pilots actually stuck ","marks":[],"data":{}}]}]},{"nodeType":"list-item","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Correlate training or CI investments with real adoption ","marks":[],"data":{}}]}]},{"nodeType":"list-item","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Identify high-cost frameworks that no longer justify ongoing support  ","marks":[],"data":{}}]}]}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"In roadmap and budget discussions, this data replaces opinions with evidence.","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"heading-2","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Why this perspective matters","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Many discussions about test frameworks stay theoretical.
ReportPortal shows what teams actually connect, run, and maintain every day.","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"That means: ","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"unordered-list","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"list-item","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Less guesswork ","marks":[],"data":{}}]}]},{"nodeType":"list-item","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Lower long-term risk ","marks":[],"data":{}}]}]},{"nodeType":"list-item","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Faster time to value once reporting is integrated  ","marks":[],"data":{}}]}]}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Framework distribution by reporting volume turns execution data into strategic insight and helps teams evolve their testing stack deliberately, not accidentally.","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"By 2025, ReportPortal usage clearly shows a shift toward JavaScript-based frameworks, with Playwright leading by a wide margin.","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"Java remains stable, Python stays consistent, and .NET remains niche but dependable.","marks":[],"data":{}}]},{"nodeType":"paragraph","data":{},"content":[{"nodeType":"text","value":"If your framework aligns with these trends, integration risk is low. If it doesn’t, this data gives you a realistic roadmap for what to adopt – and how to do it safely.","marks":[],"data":{}}]}]}

references.description: Which test frameworks power our test results dashboard? See real usage data and trends across automation ecosystems.
